overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a player character walking through a rural American countryside. The player moves past a large oak tree, ascends a grassy hill with dramatic storm clouds overhead, discovers a dead boar, and approaches a rustic wooden cabin with a campfire and chickens.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside with scattered oak trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past a large oak tree and ascending the grassy hillside toward the ridgeline

entered.detail: massive oak tree with thick trunk and spreading green canopy
rolling green hill covered in tall grass and wildflowers
small rustic cabin visible on the distant ridge
wooden telephone poles lining the left side of the hill

segments.scene_description: The segment opens beside a massive oak tree in an open grassland. The player walks past the tree and begins ascending a gentle hill, with utility poles visible along the ridgeline and a distant cabin barely visible through the atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: hilltop overlooking valley with distant lake

events.description: crests the hill revealing a panoramic view of the valley and distant lake
begins descending the slope toward the valley floor

agents.ego_description: walking over the hillcrest and descending toward the valley with scattered trees and eroded cliffs

entered.detail: body of water visible in the valley below under dark storm clouds
exposed earth and rock formation on the left side of the path
small oak trees dotting the hillside

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the hilltop, revealing a sweeping view of a distant lake nestled in the valley below. Dark storm clouds gather on the right horizon as the player descends through grassy terrain with eroded earth cliffs on the left, moving away from the starting tree.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic cabin clearing with farm animals

events.description: discovers a dead boar lying in the grass near the path
approaches the wooden cabin with smoking campfire and scattered chickens

agents.ego_description: approaching the dead boar and continuing toward the cabin area with chickens scattered about

notable_agents.action: dead boar lying on its side in the tall grass with visible wounds

entered.detail: weathered wooden cabin with sloped roof and porch
smoking campfire with cooking pot in front of the cabin
wooden cart with wheels parked near the cabin
rustic split-rail fence enclosing the clearing

segments.scene_description: The player discovers a dead boar in the grass and continues toward a rustic wooden cabin. Chickens scatter around the clearing near a smoking campfire and wooden farm structures, with the cabin's weathered facade becoming prominent as the player enters the homestead area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an open grassland through a stormy hillside and into a rustic homestead. It begins beside a massive oak tree, moving past the trunk to ascend a gentle hill where utility poles line the ridgeline and a distant cabin emerges through the atmospheric haze. As the camera reaches the hilltop, the view expands to reveal a distant lake in the valley below while dark storm clouds gather on the horizon. The scene then shifts as the player descends through grassy terrain and eroded earth cliffs, passing a dead boar in the grass before approaching a weathered wooden cabin. Finally, the movement leads into the homestead clearing, where chickens scatter around a smoking campfire and rustic farm structures.
